snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 13 Teaser - 11th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

snippet.title: तेज मध्यम या धीमी खाद्य चुनौती Multi DO Challenge
snippet.description:
आप आमतौर पर कैसे खाते हैं - धीमी, मध्यम या तेज गति से? हमें  कमेंट सेक्शन में बताएं  और  हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब  करें। हमारे  चैनल के साथ  जिंदगी  कभी  उबाऊ नहीं होगी  इसलिए हमारे  सभी  वीडियो को  देखें! अगली बार तक के लिए अलविदा !

क्या आपको एक या उससे ज़्यादा फायदेमंद लगे ये बहुत बढ़िया भाड़े? याद से इस धन को दोस्तों से बांटें इस वीडियो को शेयर कर के! और ऐसे और फायदेमंद हैक्स के लिए यू ट्यूब  चैनल Multi DO को सब्सक्राइब करना ना भूलें!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 04 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th Mar 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 04 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th Mar 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher

Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Qayamat - Episode 20 Teaser - 10th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Qayamat - Episode 20 Teaser - 10th March 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Qayamat is a story of a young and beautiful girl whose life decisions are dominated by those around her. Eventually, all hell breaks loose when the people closest to her repeatedly make the same mistake making her future bleak. Ifrah along with her parents and elder sister Samra belongs to the lower middle class and believes in hard work and honesty. Ifrah and Samra’s parents are put in a tough spot when Ifrah’s uncle Mukhtar asks for Samra’s hand in marriage for his son Rashid. The families agree to the proposal without taking Samra’s approval however soon after marriage Samra suffers mistreatment from Rashid until she meets a tragic incident leaving Ifrah to face the dire consequences.
Unable to learn from their past mistake, Ifrah’s parents agree to the wishes of Mukhtar and Rashid leaving Ifrah alone. Despite being aware of Rashid’s vicious and ill-behavior, will Ifrah follow the path of her elder sister Samra? Or will she forsake her true self in the need for revenge? Despite all the hardships and the pain of losing a loved one, how will Ifrah respond to the situation around her?
Written by: Sarwat Nazeer
Directed by: Ali Faizan
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Ahsan Khan
Neelum Munir
Amar Khan
Haroon Shahid
Saba Faisal
Shabbir Jan
Noor-Ul-Hasan
Kinza Malik
Sana Fakhar
Mizna Waqas
Haris Waheed

snippet.title: 27 Rajab Shab E Meraj Aur Jumme Ki Tasbih | Apki Mutthi Dolat Se Bhar Jayegi
snippet.description:
Shab e meraj is come at the 27th rajab date along with Friday Jummah. Insha ALLAH apki mutthi dolat se bhar jayegi. On the night of shab e meraj mosques across the country are beautifully decorated, while believers perform Nawafil and ask for forgiveness. This night is very special in Islam. Shab E Meraj or Lailatul Qadr is Holy night for all Muslims. In this night, or beloved Prophet Muhammad (PB UH) had a journey to the heaven.  During this night 5 daily prayers were made obligatory on all Muslims. Muslims celebrate this night every year.
27th Rajab night if you perform prayer and ask to ALLAH for anything your all probelms will be solved and ALLAH will give you sustenance wealth or money after reading some dhikr. You should never miss this night. The Isra Night or Shab-e-Miraj has so much significance because Allah Almighty blessed the Beloved Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) with His own sight. Allah Almighty Himself sent the Angel Gabriel-e-Ameen to call His last companion Holy Prophet Muhammad (SAW) to blessed Him with His own sight. Thanks for watching
#daily #URDU #update

►Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DailyUrduUpdate
  
►Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/DailyUrduUpdate

snippet.title: Dangerous खिलाड़ी! | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

snippet.title: के जी एफ स्टार यश की नई रिलीज़ मूवी " मेरी जान " हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में
snippet.description:
के जी एफ स्टार यश की नई रिलीज़ मूवी " मेरी जान " हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में

Movie Title - Meri Jaan (Jaanu)
Starring - Yash, Deepa Sannidhi
Director - Preetham Gubbi
Genre - Hindi Action-Romance Movie

SYNOPSIS:
Meri Jaan (Jaanu) is a 2015 Hindi Dubbed action-romance film directed by Preetham Gubbi and produced by Jayanna combines. Yash and Deepa Sannidhi are the lead actors while Rangayana Raghu, Sadhu Kokila, Shobaraj among others play the supporting roles. V. Harikrishna is the score and soundtrack composer.

Casting:
Deepa Sannidhi, a much sought after actress with two hits in the last year - Saarathi and Paramathma is in her third film with Yash. Rangayana Raghu, Shobaraj, Sangeetha, Madhu, Sadhu Kokila, Layendra are also in the supporting cast.

Box Office:
Jaanu was a much anticipated film and got a good opening at the box office, due to hit songs and youth fan following of Yash. But the film met with mixed response upon release, although it went on to be commercially successful at the box office by completing 50 days of run.

Development:
Following the debacle of Haage Summane and success of Johny Mera Naam Preethi Mera Kaam, Preetham Gubbi teamed up yet again with the Jayanna combines banner. Jayanna and Bogendra were producers for his earlier films too.

#yash #yashhindidubbedmovie #yashnewmovie #2021

snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I

I worked my whole life

Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the

On the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin – Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

Listen to Panghat on JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/panghat-from-roohi/GwkZVgFnW3g

Also listen on:

Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2g8fA9Ijc3sAlfkQFlYxsf?si=UYQN_L3uQ6i8GZjFA5KVeA&utm_source=whatsapp
Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/panghat-from-roohi
Amazon prime music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X3NH8HJ?trackAsin=B08X3MX1P1&ref=dm_sh_4tqolTG0zNYeUeiswLbAMLYYz
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJeGyKmK/
Wynk music - https://wynk.in/u/EsLKwTcwf 
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/panghat-from-roohi-single/1554475918?ls
Roposo - https://www.roposo.com/createpost?audio=e8c97b13-e555-4b68-9ce0-db4ae43e70c0


Song – Panghat 
Film - Roohi
Music Composer - Sachin - Jigar
Lyricist - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singer - Asees Kaur, Divya Kumar , Sachin- Jigar
Rap by Mellow D 
Arranged & Programmed - Sachin- Jigar
Assistant Programmers - Hrishikesh Gangan & Abhishek Singh
Music Production Head - Romil Ved
Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai & FSOB Studios
Assistant Mix Engineer - Michael Edwin Pillai

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma 
Directed by: Hardik Mehta 
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba 
Music by: Sachin-Jigar
A Jio Studios Release
By Maddock Films 

Lyrics :- 
JULMI BADI AUKAT PE YE RAAT AAYI HAIMANN TO HAI MERA PAWANMAGAR 
YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI

PANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTIPANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR

(ANTRA)
O SAIYAAN BAABUJI BUMBAIYATERI BUTTERFALAIYAKABSE BAITHI TERI RAAH TAAKE

DAAAIYA APNE PYAAR KI NAAIYABEECH BHAVAR MAI NAAIYAPAAR LAGA JOGAN KE BAAGH JAGE

O MERI FULJADIYO RESABAR ZARA KARIYO RE

HAANSABAR KARTE HUE KITNA BHARUUN MAIHANDPUMP SE MATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
PAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KI
BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI
PANGHATPE GAT GATKARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTI
SAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

snippet.title: Ahmedabad की Ayesha ने क्यों दी जान ? रुला गया उसक वीडियो ! Vardaat I Mar 1, 2021
snippet.description:
Ahmedabad की 23 साल की Ayesha का वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर दो दिनों से पूरे देश को रुला रहा है. इस वीडियो के कुछ मिनट बाद ही Ayesha की मौत हो जाती है. Ayesha वीडियो में अपना पैगाम रिकॉर्ड करती है. इसके बाद मां-बाप को फोन करती है. फोन रखते ही वो नदी में छलांग लगा देती है. Ayesha इस देश की उन हजारों लड़कियों में से एक है, जिनकी मौत दहेज की वजह से हो जाती है. देखें Vardaat, Shams Tahir Khan के साथ.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3119 - Full Episode - 10th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3119: 
-----------------------
With Bhogilal and Champaklal getting the land deal sorted out in the drawing-room, the Gokuldham members are growing restless waiting in the kitchen and the bedroom. In the ensuing chaos, there's a loud noise from the bedroom. Champaklal says that he has kept a dog locked up in the bedroom. Hearing this, Jethalal is forced to bark like a dog so as to avoid any suspicions from Bhogilal. Watch the full episode now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: लेटेस्ट नई रिलीज़ मूवी " यौद्धा "हिंदी डब में | नई साउथ एक्शन मूवी हिंदी में |भारत,मीरा स्टोरी दर्शन
snippet.description:
Watch this Bollywood Hindi Action Movie "Nepali The Warrior" (dubbed from Tamil Superhit film "Nepali") starring Bharat, Meera Jasmine, Govind Namdeo. 

Synopsis-
The movie revolves around Karthik (Bharath), a software engineer. He comes across Priya (Meera Jasmine) in a hill station. After formal acquaintance, love blossoms between them.
As usual, the girl family protests their affair. Eventually, the couple walks out of the house and get married. They face trouble in the form of a greedy and sexual maniac police officer. He lusts on Priya. When he tries to molest her, she gets killed. The blame falls on Karthik.
He kills the police officer and goes to jail, where he meets a Nepali social worker (Govind Namdeo), who voices for women harassed in the workplace. Inspired by the Nepali, Karthik comes out of the prison to punish those who misbehave with women at the workplace. He bumps off a computer engineer, a professor and a doctor dressed as a Nepali youth.
DCP Gautham (Prem) takes up the task of cracking the serial murders. Does he manage to pin down Karthik forms the crux?
tags: new release south dubbed hit movie

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 309 - Full Episode - 26th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 309: Vivan Became Unconscious
--------------------------------------------------------
Vivan became unconscious of the unknown Villen is trying to take all power of Vivan. Baalveer and Ananya successfully started the airplane and they are all set to leave the island. watch the full episode now.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: Tapu Sena Ka Peecha! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | TMKOC Comedy | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.title: Coronavirus in Pakistan: Shafqat Mehmood says schools to be closed in several cities from Monday
snippet.description:
Coronavirus in Pakistan: Shafqat Mehmood says schools to be closed in several cities from Monday

ISLAMABAD:  Federal Minister for Education Shafqat Mahmood is  holding an important press conference with Special Assistant to the Prime Minister on Health Dr Faisal Sultan at the National Command and Operations Centre (NCOC) to review the coronavirus situation in the country and school opening modalities.

localized.description:
Coronavirus in Pakistan: Shafqat Mehmood says schools to be closed in several cities from Monday

ISLAMABAD:  Federal Minister for Education Shafqat Mahmood is  holding an important press conference with Special Assistant to the Prime Minister on Health Dr Faisal Sultan at the National Command and Operations Centre (NCOC) to review the coronavirus situation in the country and school opening modalities.


For More Videos Subscribe - https://www.youtube.com/geonews
Visit our Website for More Latest Update - https://www.geo.tv/

snippet.title: Six sixes in six balls: Kieron Pollard becomes third batsman to produce perfect over
snippet.description:
Kieron Pollard of West Indies has become the third batsman to score six sixes in one over in international cricket. His feat came during a four-wicket win against Sri Lanka in the opening tie of a four-match Twenty20 series in the Caribbean. The spinner Akila Danajaya was the unfortunate victim, having taken a hat-trick in his previous over. Pollard took the score from 62 to 98-4 in six deliveries. Pollard joins an exclusive list featuring South Africa's Herschelle Gibbs and India's Yuvraj Singh. 
Watch more from the amazing world of sport series here ► https://www.theguardian.com/sport/series/amazing-world-of-sport

#वोआफेयरीटेल्सइंग्लिश    
#वोआफेयरीटेल्स
#इंग्लिशफेयरीटेल्स

फेयरी टेल्स चैनल बच्चों के लिए दिलचस्प परी कथा कहानियां प्रदान करता है जो रचनात्मक और रंगीन तरीके से दिखाई जाती  हैं। इसके अलावा, इन सब में शैक्षिक बातें भी शामिल हैं जिसका उद्देश्य आपके बच्चों को स्वाभाविक रूप से और धीरे से शिक्षित करना है। हमारी सूचि को इन श्रेणियों में विभाजित किया गया है: कल्पित, लोककथा, जादुई, पौराणिक, किंवदंती और कथाएं जो हर विशिष्ट प्लेलिस्ट में पाई जा सकती हैं। आशा है कि आप सभी हमारे चैनल का आनंद लेंगे और नए अपलोड किए गए वीडियो की सूचना प्राप्त करने के लिए कृपया सब्सक्राइब करें । 


अस्वीकरण                                                                                                                                                                                               
► WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और इसके सभी वीडियो शीर्षक 16 C.F.R के अर्थ में "बच्चों को निर्देशित नहीं" हैं। §312.2 बच्चों की ऑनलाइन गोपनीयता सुरक्षा अधिनियम (यूएसए) 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों के लिए नहीं है। WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी और उसके मालिक (ओं), एजेंटों, प्रतिनिधियों, और कर्मचारियों ने 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से कोई जानकारी एकत्र नहीं की और 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से जानकारी एकत्र करने के लिए किसी भी तीसरे पक्ष को स्पष्ट रूप से अनुमति नहीं दी। WOA फेयरी टेल्स की ओर से - हिंदी। इसके अलावा, WOA फेयरी टेल्स - हिंदी, YouTube और इसके एजेंटों और सहायक कंपनियों, या किसी भी अन्य संबद्ध तीसरे पक्ष की प्रथाओं और नीतियों, डेटा संग्रह के बारे में किसी भी और सभी दायित्व या जिम्मेदारी से इनकार करता है।       इस चैनल में सभी ऑडियो और विज़ुअल कंटेंट SCONNECT CO, LTD, audiojungle.net के स्वामित्व में हैं और क्रिएटिव कॉमन्स रिविज़न के तहत लाइसेंस प्राप्त हैं।

snippet.title: PM Imran Khan's Speech after Securing Vote of Confidence | 6th March 2021
snippet.description:
#PMImranKhanSpeechToday #PMImranKhan #VoteOfConfidence #Democracy

-PM Imran Khan delivers a speech after securing votes of confidence from the Parliament.

-PM Imran vows to fight against Corrupt Practices and Corrupt Politicians weakening the democracy in the country.

-PM Imran Khan named Asif Ali Zardari and Nawaz Sharif as Dacoits who looted Pakistan's wealth.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3118 - Full Episode - 9th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3118: 
-----------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: MAZAA | B Praak | Jaani | Arvindr K | New Hindi Songs 2021 |Gurmeet | Hansika | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
"There is no love without forgiveness and there is no forgiveness without love"

"Mazaa" is a song about confession, love, betrayal, regret, and forgiveness from beloved... 

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

Audio Credits:
Singer& Music By: B Praak
Lyricist & Composer: Jaani 
Video: Arvinder Khaira 
Presentation by: Dilraj Nandha 

Team:- 
Creative director:- Amrinder Singh 
Music Themes Designed By B Praak
Arranged&Programmed By Kartik dev Gaurav Dev 
Flute By Paras Nath
Violin By Manas 
Mix&Mastered By Gurjinder&Akash
B Praak Costume by: Mayurkataria
Assistant Director: Satnam Singh, Jais Sivia, Sukhman Singh
Production by: Third eye films (Faheem Rahiman) Dubai

Hansika Motwani Team:  
Hairstylist: Savita Dnyanoba Sankpal 
Makeup Artist: Reshma Merchant 
Costume: Pranab Sood
BTS team: Paul Davidson 

Gurmeet Choudhary Team
Makeup: Sangeeta Rawal 
Makeup Assitant: Rasika Shinde 
Hair: Asir Sayeed (team HAKIM AALIM )
Costume: Yash Badheka
Manager: Vasudha Grover ( TOABH ENTERTAINMENT)
Driver: Pintu Yaadav 
Personal assistant: Pintu yaadav


Line production - Vikrant kaushik, Adesh Gola, Arun Paharia 
Mumbai Production - Anuj Tiwari
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 

#BPraak
#Mazaa
#Jaani 
#ArvindrKhaira 
#SaregamaMusic

Lyrics:
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Baho Mein So ke, Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

snippet.title: Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6
snippet.description:
Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6

Groove with us to the official HBL PSL 6 anthem as we celebrate the moments of finesse that one finds in the heart of every cricket match. 

This year’s anthem also reflects the realities of COVID-19. As a number of fans will be watching Pakistan’s biggest sporting event remotely, the anthem cheers on players on the field and their fans at home to celebrate their groove!

The anthem is a celebration of Pakistan’s musical diversity as Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig and Young Stunners come together to sing the HBL PSL anthem for the first time ever. The mix of artists is particularly exciting as it represents artists from opposite ends of Pakistan’s musical spectrum. The anthem brings together voices from Pakistan’s rich musical landscape: regional folk and urban sounds of pop and hip-hop.

Music Produced by Xulfi
Agency: Giraffe Pakistan
Composed by Xulfi and Adnan Dhool
Lyrics: Adnan Dhool, Young Stunners (Talha Younus, Talha Anjum)
Associate Music Producer: Bilal Haider
Executive Producer: Muhammad Ibrahim
Operations Manager: Saad Mansoor
Vocals: Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig, Young Stunners 
Recorded and Mixed by Xulfi @ Xth Harmonic
Mastered by Chris Gehringer @ Sterling Sound, Edgewater NJ.
Production House: Seeme Production 
Executive Producer: Shehzad Ahmed 
Producer: Madiha Majeed 
Director: Fida Moin
DOP: Zain Haleem 
Post Producer: Faisal Shaikh 
Edit: Ahsan Raza 
Grade: Tahir Moosa 
Post and animation: Owais Roy, Post Island

snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present 
In association with

snippet.title: Lavanya Tripathi New Released Full Hindi Dubbed | South Indian Movie Dubbed in Hindi Full Movie 2021
snippet.description:
The film starts with the death of a renowned neurologist named Pramodh (R. Amarendran). His gym trainer Dheena (Sai Dheena) is seen paying respects at the funeral before leaving. The plot then shifts to a young crime inspector named Kumaran (Sundeep Kishan), who is chasing a petty thief and witnesses Dheena murdering his wife. Kumaran chases Dheena, who corners him and halts him with a blow to his head. In an ensuing tussle, Kumaran manages to kill Dheena.

A meeting with psychiatrist Aadhirai (Lavanya Tripathi) ends on a rough note when she deems him medically unfit to rejoin the police force. Later, when he faces symptoms which attribute to PTSD, he mends his ways with Aadhirai, who helps him overcome his disorder. A second murder happens in which a famous actress, Vishma (Akshara Gowda) is killed. Kumaran visits the spot and gets stressed and shocked upon finding the similar blood stains from the earlier murder and the same brand of cigarette smoked by the murderer. Aadhirai finds him, treats him for his PTSD, and makes him normal. Kumaran meets with Rudhran (Daniel Balaji) and introduces Aadhirai to him as a motivational speaker. Kumaran, now fitter, sets out his investigation and finds that a makeup man named Gopi (Mime Gopi) must have done the murder as he is the prime suspect. Upon investigation, he gets to know that Gopi and Dheena showed a totally different behavior a few days before they committed the murders. Kumaran tracks down Gopi, but he jumps to his death before confessing anything.

Subscribe Us - http://goo.gl/vmw18Y

Like Us on FB - https://www.facebook.com/wamindiamovies

G+ - https://plus.google.com/+WAMIndiaMovies

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 313 - Full Episode - 4th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 313: The Monster Plant 
--------------------------------------------------------
Chintu is captured by the monster plant. Baalveer makes a plan to deal with the monster plant and asked Vivan to stand in front of the monster plant. Baalveer gives an axe to Vivan and Vivan cuts down the Monster plant. To know, watch the full episode.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: PM Imran Khan ki Jeet per Irshad Bhatti ka Tajzia..!
snippet.description:
Imran Khan ki Jeet per Irshad Bhatti ka Tajzia..!

Live updates: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sOdRPZwcxOw

PM Imran Khan to seek the vote of confidence in National Assembly session after Senate upset.

Pakistan Democratic Movement won't be participating in the session.

The vote of confidence is taken through an open ballot.

Prior to PM Khan, Nawaz Sharif had sought a voluntary vote of confidence from the Parliament after his reinstatement was granted by the Supreme Court in 1993.

The Opposition alliance, Pakistan Democratic Movement (PDM), will be boycotting the NA session.

For More Videos Subscribe - https://www.youtube.com/geonews​
Visit our Website for More Latest Update - https://www.geo.tv/​

#VoteOfConfidence​
#PakistanNews​
#GeoNewsLive

Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te

Mere geet utte ne sharabi nachde
Khadki jande ne ni glass kach de
Khadke de vicho mennu saaj sunn de
Saaja' vicho' kann teri vaaj sunn de
Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakе bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
Jithе mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

snippet.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai | Sirat at Goenka House
snippet.description:
Honewaala hai Sirat ki zindagi ka sabse badaa imtehaan. Jo Sirat khud mamtaa se rahi hai itni door, kya wo Maa ka pyaar de paayegi Kairav ko?

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo▶ ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

Listen the song on; 
Gaana   http://bit.ly/3s4HeJ8
JioSaavn   http://bit.ly/3awVcgU
Wynk    https://wynk.in/u/ZOEtV7A0k
Spotify  http://spoti.fi/2ZtaiOs
Hungama   https://bit.ly/3asEcIW
Amazon Prime Music   https://amzn.to/3pvAEK4
Resso    https://m.resso.app/ZSJJEkJhL/
YT Music   https://bit.ly/2ZplF9R
Apple Music   http://apple.co/3dua1Db



Label:: Saregama India Ltd.

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com
